name: Hot Springs Health and Fitness
description: Hot Springs Health and Fitness is a place to play pickleball in Hot Springs, AR. There are 9 courts. 3 are indoors and 6 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Hot Springs YMCA
description: All open play, no reservations allowed, balls and nets provided, bring your paddle.

name: Pickleball Savings Headquarters
description: Come play pickleball at Pickleball Savings Headquarters in Pearcy, AR! There are 2 indoor acrylic courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Vulcan Pickleball Park
description: Come play pickleball at Vulcan Pickleball Park in Hot Springs, AR! There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. You can’t reserve the courts. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like lights.

name: Vulcan Pickleball Park Hot Springs
description: Vulcan Pickleball Park Hot Springs is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hot Springs, AR. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are private. Players have access to lights, restrooms, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, water, locker rooms, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts can be reserved.
